en: Here, let me show you how it's done.
ko: 어떻게 하는 건지 보여줄게 벳시 그만해
어떻게 하는 건지 보여줄게 벳시 그만해

en: Wow, help, oh no. In that.
I got you, I got you.
Take my hand. I got you.
You could have run, but you didn't.
ko: 도망칠 수 있었는데 안 했잖아 내가 말했잖아 넌 내

en: I told you, you are my favorite villain in the world.
ko: 도망칠 수 있었는데 안 했잖아 내가 말했잖아 넌 내

en: I could not let you get eaten by crocodiles, even though that would have been kind of cool to watch.
